items.subject: 补齐 post-compact repair receipt memory 使用回执
items.description: post-compact repair receipt memory usage gaps: receipt_usage_state_or_reverify,receipt_historical_boundary
items.instruction:
Post-compact reinjection repair receipt memory usage corrected-receipt task:
- group=phase310-closure-feedback-group
- target_project=api
- original_worker_context_packet_id=phase310-shared-packet
- original_binding_id=phase310-shared-binding
- original_task_agent_session_id=phase310-shared-receipt-task-session
- original_native_session_id=phase310-shared-receipt-native-session
- required_memory_docs=post-compact-completion-memory-preservation-repair-closures.md
- missing_current_source_verified_docs=post-compact-completion-memory-preservation-repair-closures.md
- gaps=receipt_usage_state_or_reverify,receipt_historical_boundary
- Return a corrected CCM_AGENT_RECEIPT for the newly bound repair session.
- memoryUsed must cite every used/verified required doc with usageState and currentSourceVerified=true.
- memoryIgnored must cite every ignored required doc with usageState=ignored and reason.
- State: historical repair completion is recovery evidence, not permanent repository truth.
- replayRepairDispatchBriefUsage must cite this brief_id/work_item_id as verified.
- Do not reuse the original task/native session ids as the new repair-session identity.
items.expected: A corrected CCM_AGENT_RECEIPT from the newly bound repair session covers every required receipt MEMORY.md with fresh verification or an ignored reason.
items.source_reason: post-compact repair receipt memory usage gaps: receipt_usage_state_or_reverify,receipt_historical_boundary
